violations.text: Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025
A pipe in the basement was observed leaking with a bucket underneath catching water. Per PIC, service has been called. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025

Raw animal foods (hamburgers) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cooked meats) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
Various foods were observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

Single service items were stored next to handwash sink and are not being stored properly in their original protective package. Single service items shall be protected from contamination where it is not exposed to splash or other contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
Handwash sink located in the front kitchen is lacking a splash guard. A splash guard is installed to prevent cross contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
